mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipes (user_id, title, title_image, description, cooking_time, difficulty_id, purpose_id, cuisine_id, is_ai_generated, is_public) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{titleImage}, #{description}, #{cookingTime}, #{difficultyId}, #{purposeId}, #{cuisineId}, #{isAiGenerated}, #{isPublic})
INSERT INTO recipe_ingredients (recipe_id, name, normalized_name, quantity, unit, is_ai_generated) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{name}, #{normalizedName}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{isAiGenerated})
INSERT INTO recipe_steps (recipe_id, step_order, content) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{stepOrder}, #{content})
INSERT INTO recipe_nutrients (recipe_id, nutrient_name, amount, unit) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{nutrientName}, #{amount}, #{unit})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, d.name AS difficulty_name, p.name AS purpose_name, c.name AS cuisine_name, u.nickname AS user_nickname FROM recipes r JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id JOIN purposes p ON r.purpose_id = p.id JOIN cuisines c ON r.cuisine_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM recipe_steps WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY step_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE recipes SET is_public = #{isPublic} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image as titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time as cookingTime, r.like_count as likeCount, r.comment_count as commentCount, r.view_count as viewCount, r.is_public as isPublic, r.is_ai_generated as isAiGenerated, u.nickname as authorNickname, d.name as difficultyName FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE r.is_public = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.popularity_score DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image as titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time as cookingTime, r.like_count as likeCount, r.comment_count as commentCount, r.view_count as viewCount, r.is_public as isPublic, r.is_ai_generated as isAiGenerated, u.nickname as authorNickname, d.name as difficultyName FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE r.is_public = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image as titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time as cookingTime, r.like_count as likeCount, r.comment_count as commentCount, r.view_count as viewCount, r.is_public as isPublic, r.is_ai_generated as isAiGenerated, u.nickname as authorNickname, d.name as difficultyName FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image as titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time as cookingTime, r.like_count as likeCount, r.comment_count as commentCount, r.view_count as viewCount, r.is_public as isPublic, r.is_ai_generated as isAiGenerated, u.nickname as authorNickname, d.name as difficultyName FROM recipes r JOIN recipe_likes rl ON r.id = rl.recipe_id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE rl.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rl.created_at DESC
